series_metadata.series_description: Collection of newspaper, television, radio and other media articles, columns and editorials about ODJFS services which are published online. The collection is compiled every weekday morning by Communications staff to brief ODJFS senior and executive staff and prepare possible media responses. The collection is also posted on the innerweb..

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 1 years, then destroy., Electronic: Erase
